category.scope_note: Hand-held and transportable electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Senegal, including chargers, battery packs, and cordless tools with embedded radio.

title.en: China-to-Senegal Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入塞内加尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入塞內加爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Senegal market access: NS/IEC 62841 electrical safety, EMC, ASN/PEC conformity and import inspection, ARTP radio authorisation for cordless tools, and French-language documentation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与塞内加尔市场准入对照：NS/IEC 62841 电气安全、电磁兼容、ASN/PEC 符合性与进口检验、无绳工具的 ARTP 无线电许可，以及法语文件要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與塞內加爾市場准入對照：NS/IEC 62841 電氣安全、電磁相容、ASN/PEC 符合性與進口檢驗、無繩工具的 ARTP 無線電許可，以及法語文件要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Senegalese law, ASN-adopted standards, PEC/VoC conformity procedures, ARTP radio rules, and import-inspection practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行塞内加尔法律、ASN 采纳的标准、PEC/VoC 符合性程序、ARTP 无线电规则及进口检验实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行塞內加爾法律、ASN 採納的標準、PEC/VoC 符合性程序、ARTP 無線電規則及進口檢驗實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Senegal, the practical baseline is conformity to ASN-adopted NS/IEC 62841 electrical-safety standards plus the Ministry of Trade PEC (Programme d'Evaluation de la Conformite) / Verification of Conformity regime for import inspection, with French-language documentation; cordless tools with embedded radio additionally need ARTP authorisation. Senegal generally adopts IEC standards and does not run an EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise product regime, so those EU obligations do not transpose directly.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入塞内加尔，实务基线是符合 ASN 采纳的 NS/IEC 62841 电气安全标准，并通过贸易部 PEC（符合性评估计划）/符合性验证（VoC）进口检验制度，并附法语文件；带内嵌无线电的无绳工具还需 ARTP 许可。塞内加尔通常采纳 IEC 标准，且没有欧盟式的横向 RoHS、电池或户外噪声产品制度，因此这些欧盟义务不会直接套用。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入塞內加爾，實務基線是符合 ASN 採納的 NS/IEC 62841 電氣安全標準，並通過貿易部 PEC（符合性評估計劃）/符合性驗證（VoC）進口檢驗制度，並附法語文件；帶內嵌無線電的無繩工具還需 ARTP 許可。塞內加爾通常採納 IEC 標準，且沒有歐盟式的橫向 RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲產品制度，因此這些歐盟義務不會直接套用。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal sources are preferred over local PDFs.
